utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully specified with details and costs: (1) property includes address, type, price, features, and status; (2) financing includes method, source, terms, and amounts; (3) legal_services includes provider, scope, and cost; (4) moving_services includes provider, scope, timeline, and cost; (5) setup_services includes detailed utilities and activation costs; (6) total_budget includes breakdown of all costs and total. Therefore, all items are present and fully detailed.
